description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, set the CONTAINER_IMAGE variable to registry.gitlab.com/$CI_PROJECT_PATH and configure DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 and DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375. Add a build stage with a build-master job that runs only on the master branch, uses a before_script to log in to the registry with gitlab-ci-token and $CI_JOB_TOKEN, then runs docker pull $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest || true, docker build --build-arg BUILD_DATE=$(date +'%Y_%m_%d') --cache-from $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest --tag $CONTAINER_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF --tag $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest ., and finally docker push $CONTAINER_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF and docker push $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest. Add a deploy stage with a deploy job that runs docker run --rm byrnedo/alpine-curl -X POST www.wotanii.de:8555/hooks/stabbot?token=$DEPLOY_TOKEN. Both jobs require privileged runners.
